name: Information Technology
description: Manages all technology infrastructure, software development, cybersecurity, and digital transformation initiatives across the organization.

name: Human Resources
description: Oversees recruitment, employee relations, benefits administration, training programs, and organizational development.

name: Finance & Accounting
description: Handles financial planning, budgeting, accounts payable/receivable, tax compliance, and financial reporting.

name: Operations
description: Manages day-to-day operational activities, supply chain logistics, quality assurance, and process optimization.

name: Marketing
description: Drives brand strategy, digital marketing campaigns, market research, content creation, and public relations.

name: Research & Development
description: Leads product innovation, prototype development, research partnerships, and technology advancement programs.

name: Facilities Management
description: Maintains building infrastructure, office equipment, safety compliance, and workplace environment standards.

name: Executive Office
description: Senior leadership team including CEO, COO, and CTO offices managing strategic direction and governance.
